title: Polymarket BTC 5 Minutes Bot
author: Stimulant-RS
selftext:
Hello! I built this signal bot and I'm looking to build a profitable community for everyone, this has been tested I was able to make some profit and my goal is basically to become the best trading bot for Polymarket and easy to use.

Polymarket's BTC Up/Down 5-minute markets have an edge window: the first 2 minutes of every slot, when odds are still near 50/50. Miss it and you're buying at 70-80¢.

**How the bot works:**

\- 6 technical indicators vote on BTC direction every slot  
\- Signal locks at the 2-minute mark  
\- Only shows if Polymarket crowd odds (55¢+) confirm  
\- SKIP when technicals and market disagree

**Links:**

\- Website: [https://polypredictor.org](https://polypredictor.org/)  
\- Discord: [https://discord.gg/t9RhcDDcRW](https://discord.gg/t9RhcDDcRW)

There is a free trial of 30 minutes that resets every 24h so that you can try it and see if it works for you and I will be giving away 3 lifetime codes, so be sure to join the discord! 🎁

\- Please note that predictions are **not guaranteed to be 100% accurate**. Errors can happen and market conditions can be volatile and unpredictable.

comments.author: Janet-Voigt
comments.body:
not gonna lie this sounds good in theory but those 5min markets move way faster than a fixed “2 min signal lock”

by the time you confirm with crowd odds you’re often already paying the premium, especially once things start trending

I tried similar setups early on and they looked solid until volatility picked up, then the edge just disappears

what worked better for me was moving away from fixed indicator voting and more towards reacting to flow + changing conditions (less static, more adaptive)

also interesting how your signals behave after a larger sample — mine changed quite a bit after running a few hundred / 1k+ trades lol

curious if you tracked performance over longer runs or mostly shorter tests?
